{%- if show_copyright %}
{%- if hasdoc('copyright') %} {% trans path=pathto('copyright'), copyright=copyright|e -%} © {{ copyright }} {{ author }} {%- endtrans %} {%- else %} {% trans copyright=copyright|e -%} © {{ copyright }} {{ author }} {%- endtrans %} {%- endif %}
{%- endif %} {%- if license and license.name -%} {%- if license.url -%}
This project is licensed under {{ license.name }}
{%- else -%}
This project is licensed under {{ license.name }}
{%- endif -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if last_updated -%}
{% trans last_updated=last_updated|e -%} Last updated on {{ last_updated }} {%- endtrans -%}
{%- endif %}
Manage your tracker settings
